steps.title: Identify the subject and its number
steps.content: Even-toed ungulates is a plural noun serving as the sentence's subject. The appositive phrase such as the domestic goat... is merely an example.

steps.title: Apply the subject-verb agreement rule
steps.content: A plural subject requires a plural verb. Choice D belong is the only plural verb form offered. The other choices are all singular verb forms that violate this rule. That matches choice D — D is correct.
